data.body: DD CLARIFICATION: The Done Definition grep check should exclude format-and-lint.sh and pre-commit-format-fix.sh as they are intentionally Python-only pre-commit hooks (not general pipeline scripts). These scripts run ruff only on staged .py files and are the appropriate place for Python-specific pre-commit linting. They will have rationale comments (Task a33d-2ac8). The completion verifier should treat these as equivalent to the 'ruff-specific legacy fallback paths' exception in DD1. The effective exception list: validate.sh, auto-format.sh, gate-2b, gate-2d, format-and-lint.sh (Python pre-commit), pre-commit-format-fix.sh (Python pre-commit), and ruff-specific legacy fallback paths.
